state.description: Sprint state. Use 'active' to start a sprint, 'closed' to end it. Transitioning to 'active' requires startDate.

startDate.description: Sprint start date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2024-01-15). Required when starting a sprint (state: active).

endDate.description: Sprint end date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2024-01-29). Required when starting a sprint (state: active).
